case_title: REKCO FINANCIAL vs. NUNO, FELIPE DE JESUS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $120.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NUNO, FELIPE DE JESUS
